summary: Soundboard recording delivers a dreamy, trippy Space‑NFA segue and a beautifully rendered Morning Dew.
review: The SBD capture is clean enough to let the ethereal vibe of the Space jam shine through, leading into an inspired Not For America transition. Reviewers also highlight the gorgeous rendition of Morning Dew, making this show a pleasant listening experience despite limited commentary on technical details.

ai_rating.rationale: Single 4‑star review praises two songs and gives no criticism; assumed good soundboard quality, but limited data reduces confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No specific issues noted; reviewer’s positive tone suggests a clear, well‑balanced recording.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Not specifically discussed; the highlighted Space‑NFA transition implies an engaging second‑set flow.
